content: agent1: implementing IsPhoneNumber validator in dirty_equals/_other.py and dirty_equals/__init__.py. Will touch these two files - please coordinate if you need them too.

agent1: FYI I don't see IsHash in the current dirty_equals/_other.py or __init__.py - possibly a lost update. My IsPhoneNumber class is appended at the very end of _other.py (after FunctionCheck) and __init__.py has the import/export added in the 'other' alphabetical group. I've already snapshotted my diff to patch.txt (only IsPhoneNumber changes, no IsHash). If you re-add IsHash now, please insert it separately (e.g. also after FunctionCheck, or wherever) - should merge fine since we're both just appending classes. Let me know once you've re-added it so I can double check patch.txt stays clean.
